title: Three Months versus Thirty Days: Is Section 34(3) Discriminatory?
description: In My Preferred Transformation & Hospitality Pvt. Ltd. v. Faridabad Implements Pvt. Ltd., 2025 INSC 56, the Supreme Court revisited the limitation framework governing challenges to arbitral awards under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996 (“ACA”). The issue before the Court was whether a petition under Section 34 filed on the next working day would be maintainable where the thirty-day condonable period expired during court vacation. The Court answered this question in the negative and
